summary: Iteration 3 verification: costing yield_per_unit formula, base64 image upload, Production Kanban matrix grouping & group move. All 4 backend costing scenarios passed (29.0 / 29.58 / 290 backward-compat / 290 yield=1). Style CRUD with base64 image persisted & returned intact. Production frontend shows exactly 2 matrix cards (ZFLWWFLT07274 CREAM/TAUPE, ZFLWWFLT07275 CREAM/WINE) with sizes 4-8, 720 per color row, 1440 per style, 2880 total. Group stage-move (CUTTING →) moved all 10 jobs of a style in one click; reload confirms card now in Cutting column with matrix intact. Styles form shows new 'Style Image (max 1MB)' uploader with preview, old image_url text input removed, BOM table now has 8 columns including a Yield column. File upload preview rendered after set_input_files.
passed: POST /api/costing/preview yield=10 waste=0 rate=290 qty=1 -> materials_cost=29.0
POST /api/styles with yield_per_unit=10 + base64 PNG image_url persisted: GET returns image intact (data:image/png;base64,...), yield_per_unit=10.0, costing.materials_cost=29.58
Production /production: PROCUREMENT column header shows '2 styles · 2880 pairs'
Production: 2 matrix cards visible — ZFLWWFLT07274 (CREAM 720 + TAUPE 720 = 1440), ZFLWWFLT07275 (CREAM 720 + WINE 720 = 1440), each with sizes 4-8 row (240/240/480/240/240)

Production: Clicking 'CUTTING →' on ZFLWWFLT07275 group moved all 10 jobs in one click; after reload the card appears in CUTTING column with full matrix preserved and PROCUREMENT shows '1 style · 1440 pairs'
Styles form: 'Style Image (max 1MB)' section with Upload Image button and placeholder preview present; image_url text input removed (0 found)
Styles form BOM table headers = ['Material','Section','Rate','Qty','Yield','Waste%','Cost/pair',''] — 8 columns including Yield
Styles form image upload: set_input_files /tmp/tiny.png -> data:image preview rendered
notes: Style listing card image banner display was not explicitly verified via locator (cards rendered but data-testid query mismatched); however style creation API persists image_url correctly and the form preview works — main agent may want to add data-testid='style-card-<id>' to listing cards for future automated coverage. Not a blocker.
